_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: a significant increase in the C/V ratio was found in Nf1+/−, Nf1, and flox/flox;Col2.3Cre+ Nf1 mice...A further increase in the C/V ratio of L5 vertebrae from Nf1 mice
details: Significant increase in spinal canal/vertebral body area ratio compared to WT, with further increase compared to Nf1+/- and Nf1flox/flox;Col2.3Cre+ mice
